Notice Of Motion For Order Further Extending Lien Pursuant To C.C.P. Sec 708.110(D)
Off Calendar Mar-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jerome Blum, Esq. 818-783-8991 of Herzlich & Blum LLP for Plaintiff MILLER LAW GROUP.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Plaintiff reports the matter is Unopposed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MILLER LAW GROUP's Motion For Order Further Extending Lien Pursuant To C.C.P. Sec 708.110(D).

Miller Law Group's motion for further extending lien is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Counsel for Miller Law Group is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portions of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
